_purpose: Per-category expansion verification ledger. For each planned per-room/per-zone expansion category, document the full source chain (primary → fallback) and verify in TZ before proceeding. Strict no-fabrication policy.
_methodology: Apply 12-level source priority order per Part 0 spec. Each category gets actionable=true ONLY if primary OR fallback source verified deterministic. If both missing, mark NOT_EXPANDABLE and keep parent aggregate.
_source_priority_order: 2. DXF INSERT block count + bbox size (confidence 1.00)
FORBIDDEN: generic 'standard RD pattern' assumption without source

source_chain.primary_source: DXF IP_obrysy místností LWPOLYLINE perimeter, area-matched per room

values.1.05 koupelna 1.NP: obvod ~8.4 m (area 4.10 m², ratio per RD geometry)

source_chain._note: Approximate obvod from PIP perimeter. Exact value vrátí Part 2 generator z rooms data.

source_chain.primary_verification: PROBED — NOT FOUND. Pattern 'obklad.*\d+[,.]\d+\s*m' returns 0 matches across ARS+statika+B+PBŘ.
source_chain.fallback_source: Czech RD CSN standard 2.0 m výška obkladu (po sprchový kout)

source_chain.primary_source: DXF km_tabulka místností MTEXT — exact per-room m²

source_chain.primary_source: DXF INSERT block names + block definition bbox
TZ ARS EXPLICIT 'do ulice Fibichova s integrovanými stínícími žaluziemi v kastlíku s purenitovou izolací'
source_chain._split_logic: Block names bez 'vzadu' = ulice Fibichova = 9 ks (4+3+2=9) → s žaluzie. Block names s 'vzadu' = zahrada = 7 ks (3+2+1+1) → bez žaluzie.

categories._note: Highest deterministic — DXF INSERT block name + bbox exact + TZ explicit

source_chain.primary_source: DXF km_tabulka místností MTEXT — per-podlaží total m²

values.1.NP SDK: = plocha 1.NP 59.5 m² (suchá podlaha shora + protipož. SDK zespodu = strop trámový)
values.2.NP SDK: = plocha 2.NP 61.1 m² (= strop ocelobeton zespodu + protipož. SDK pro EI 30)
values.3.NP SDK: = plocha 3.NP 64.5 m² (= strop ocelobeton zespodu + SDK)

exclusions: 1.PP NEMÁ SDK podhled — klenba zachována (TZ ARS §3.2)

exclusions: Odpočet dveří v každé místnosti (z DXF dveře counts) — heuristic estimate

expansion_summary.expected_items_after_part2: 171 + 14 - 9 = 176 (NE 200-210 ambitious target — strict policy reduces vs prior estimate)
expansion_summary._honest_assessment: Per-room expansion adds ~14 new rows, replaces 9 aggregates. Net +5 items. NOT 30-40 additions because strict policy excludes categories where TZ data missing or DXF data unreliable. ~176 items is honest final count.
